name: Lentil Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, steam onions, garlic, chili, and celery in 1/2 cup water until softened.
2. Add broccoli stalks and mushrooms, simmering for about five minutes.
3. Stir in vegetable stock, canned tomatoes, herbs (oregano and basil), salt, pepper, lentils, and remaining broccoli florets.
4. Simmer until lentils are tender. Add corn and tomato puree. The mixture should be sloppy.
5. In a separate pan, whisk flour into 1/4 cup cold water to form a paste. Gradually add soy milk while heating, stirring to avoid lumps.
6. Add garlic, remaining salt, pepper, nutritional yeast, and turmeric. Mix until smooth for a pourable cheese sauce.
7. Layer the mixture with spinach lasagna sheets (no-boil) on a baking dish, finishing with a layer of sheets.
8. Cover with the cheese sauce and bake at 170°C/330°F for 20 minutes.
9. Serve with salad.
